reviews.review_description: This is lightuchin a fun remake of old things it ain’t Christmas for once I’ve met the owner of this game his name is Noah last time I met him he is awesome my name is thelostgamer it has all maps and small glitches and it’s perfect game to play  and if you meet someone named of icyy tell him that he’s a poopy head

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, Your so heart warming and kind. I think you can make a great community!

reviews.review_description: You owner Noah banned me and Owen you banned me for a fair reason but why Owen he accidentally shot the kick hammer ACCIDENTALLY and we got the game like 20min ago we wanted to play horror with the moderator

developer_response.body: You had to have done something..

reviews.review_description: Banned me because I accidentally shot the kick hammer with nerf gun and kicked everyone

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear that, maybe try to not do that again.. If i am right, it says "DO NOT SHOOT PEOPLE WITH THE KICK HAMMER!" But, fairly.. that is a good reason to get banned.

reviews.review_description: Hello, This is my first ever applab game that i got onto applab this is a capuchin copy (V1)! Please download it will make my day!

developer_response.body: Sadly lightning has died, it is now me that is controlling the applab.

reviews.review_description: Idk if you remember me but me you and cyan were good friends and you game is goated BTW that all I have to say see ya lightning

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! but sadly, you cannot just ask for mod.

reviews.review_description: Can I get mod I have 2.4k I will make a review vid

This game is amazing it has lots of maps like snow land,sand land ,zero gravity and even a horror mode there is just one glitch with one of the cosmetics you can’t buy it but instead of all of that this is a very fun game:)

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, So kind!
